items.title: Regular
items.description: Average individual with no standout traits

items.title: Conformist
items.description: Follows social norms, avoids risk and conflict

items.title: Charismatic
items.description: Naturally influential and socially magnetic

items.title: Strong-Willed
items.description: Mentally resilient, difficult to influence or break

items.title: Specialist
items.description: Highly skilled in a specific field or expertise

items.title: Hobbyist
items.description: Driven by personal interests rather than necessity

items.title: Intellectual
items.description: Analytical, knowledge-driven, and thoughtful

items.title: Operator
items.description: Practical, efficient, and focused on getting things done

items.title: Criminal
items.description: Engaged in illegal activities as a lifestyle

items.title: Gang Member
items.description: Part of an organized street-level criminal group

items.title: Gang Leader
items.description: Commands a criminal group with authority and fear

items.title: Fixer
items.description: Connects people, deals, and resources in the shadows

items.title: Politician
items.description: Operates through influence, negotiation, and public image

items.title: Ideologue
items.description: Driven by strong beliefs or extremist views

items.title: Unstable
items.description: Erratic, unpredictable, or mentally unbalanced

items.title: Zealot
items.description: Fanatically devoted to a cause or belief

items.title: Dominant
items.description: Naturally assertive, takes control in social situations

items.title: Submissive
items.description: Avoids leadership, tends to follow stronger personalities

items.title: Survivor
items.description: Adaptable and hardened by adversity

items.title: Opportunist
items.description: Exploits situations for personal gain

items.title: Manipulator
items.description: Controls others through subtle influence and deceit

items.title: Enforcer
items.description: Relies on intimidation or violence to achieve goals

items.title: Mind Reading
items.description: Read surface thoughts of others

items.title: Deep Memory Probe
items.description: Access hidden or long-term memories

items.title: Mind Link
items.description: Establish two-way telepathic communication

items.title: Mental Command
items.description: Implant simple commands into a target

items.title: Memory Alteration
items.description: Modify or erase memories

items.title: Mental Shield
items.description: Protect against telepathic intrusion

items.title: Telekinesis
items.description: Move objects with the mind

items.title: Fine Manipulation
items.description: Perform delicate tasks telekinetically

items.title: Force Push
items.description: Project kinetic force outward

items.title: Levitation
items.description: Lift oneself into the air

items.title: Kinetic Barrier
items.description: Create a protective force field

items.title: Clairvoyance
items.description: See distant locations

items.title: Precognition
items.description: Glimpse possible future events

items.title: Retrocognition
items.description: Perceive past events

items.title: Aura Reading
items.description: Perceive emotions or supernatural states

items.title: Psychometry
items.description: Read history from objects

items.title: Emotional Imprint Sense
items.description: Detect lingering emotions in places

items.title: Pyrokinesis
items.description: Create and control fire

items.title: Cryokinesis
items.description: Manipulate cold and ice

items.title: Electrokinesis
items.description: Control electricity

items.title: Psychic Healing
items.description: Accelerate healing of self or others

items.title: Pain Induction
items.description: Cause intense pain mentally

items.title: Physical Enhancement
items.description: Boost strength, speed, or endurance

items.title: Paralysis
items.description: Immobilize a target’s body

items.title: Illusion Projection
items.description: Create sensory illusions

items.title: Perceptual Cloak
items.description: Avoid being noticed or perceived

items.title: Hallucination
items.description: Force a target to perceive false realities

items.title: Teleportation
items.description: Instantly move between locations

items.title: Phasing
items.description: Pass through solid matter

items.title: Spatial Distortion
items.description: Bend space locally

items.title: Time Dilation
items.description: Slow perception of time

items.title: Time Stop
items.description: Temporarily halt time in a limited area

items.title: Astral Projection
items.description: Separate consciousness from the body

items.title: Possession
items.description: Take control of another body

items.title: Psychic Drain
items.description: Absorb mental energy from others

items.title: Null Field
items.description: Suppress psychic or supernatural powers

items.title: Reality Bending
items.description: Warp reality through sheer mental force

items.title: Avenger
items.description: Driven by the Virtue of Zeal, Avengers see the supernatural as an enemy to be destroyed. Their Edges enhance combat, allowing them to strike harder, track targets relentlessly, and inflict aggravated harm against monsters.

items.title: Defender
items.description: Guided by the Virtue of Charity, Defenders focus on protecting others. Their abilities create barriers, absorb damage, and prevent supernatural forces from reaching those under their protection.

items.title: Judge
items.description: Ruled by the Virtue of Justice, Judges seek truth and accountability. Their Edges reveal guilt, enforce supernatural 'sentences', and bind targets through mystical constraints resembling contracts or imposed consequences.

items.title: Martyr
items.description: Driven by the Virtue of Faith, Martyrs endure suffering for others. Their powers allow them to take on wounds, convert pain into strength or healing, and reflect harm back onto aggressors.

items.title: Redeemer
items.description: Guided by the Virtue of Mercy, Redeemers believe monsters can be saved. Their Edges calm aggression, suppress violent urges, and weaken supernatural corruption, making targets easier to restrain or rehabilitate.

items.title: Innocent
items.description: Defined by the Virtue of Mercy, Innocents rely on instinct and intuition. Their Edges manifest through light subtle miracles: improbable luck, passive protection, and the ability to unconsciously deny or disrupt supernatural effects directed at themselves or others.

items.title: Visionary
items.description: Driven by the Virtue of Vision, Visionaries seek understanding of the supernatural. Their abilities grant visions of the future or past, reveal hidden entities, and expose illusions or concealed truths.

items.title: Hermit
items.description: Also guided by the Virtue of Vision, Hermits turn inward to perceive truth. Their Edges heighten awareness, allow them to sense unseen presences, isolate supernatural influences, and resist mental or spiritual intrusion.

items.title: Wayward
items.description: Guided by the Virtue of Courage, Waywards embrace chaos and unpredictability. Their powers manipulate chance, cause confusion, enable improbable escapes, and twist situations in their favor at critical moments.

items.title: Null
items.description: Supernaturally inert; resistant or invisible to mystical effects

items.title: Sweet Blood
items.description: Exceptionally appealing to vampires; vitae interaction is stronger or more addictive

items.title: Lucky
items.description: Unnaturally fortunate; coincidences tend to favor survival

items.title: True Faith
items.description: Possesses genuine faith capable of repelling or harming supernatural entities

items.title: Psychic
items.description: Displays innate extrasensory or mental abilities

items.title: Sorcerer
items.description: Practices structured hedge magic or rituals

items.title: Wild Attuned
items.description: Naturally aligned with beasts and primal instincts

items.title: Spirit Attuned
items.description: Sensitive to spirits and the unseen world

items.title: Wyrd Attuned
items.description: Connected to fate, destiny, or strange coincidences

items.title: Fae Attuned
items.description: Sensitive to fae presence, glamour, and illusion

items.title: Occult Initiate
items.description: Basic knowledge of supernatural lore and minor practices

items.title: Medium
items.description: Can perceive or communicate with ghosts

items.title: Dreamer
items.description: Experiences vivid or prophetic dreams tied to the supernatural

items.title: Hunter
items.description: Instinctively aware of supernatural threats and driven to oppose them

items.title: Mortal
items.description: A regular human

items.title: Excentric
items.description: Mortals living on the edge of the supernatural world

items.title: Vampire
items.description: A member of the undead

items.title: Ghoul
items.description: A mortal servant of the undead

items.title: Ravenous
items.description: Predators of the flesh of the living, driven by hunger with held by their human contiousness, they have an specialized organ used to hunt and manifest habilities.

items.title: Garou (werebeast)
items.description: Furious beast metamorphs, warriors of gaia or tainted by the wyrm.

items.title: Creature of the Night
items.description: Something stranger and older

items.title: Fae
items.description: Strange beings of tale and legend, only half here and somehow more present than most
